Class MoveMailRequest

java.lang.Object
com.daraxtlar.quantummail.model.MoveMailRequest
public class MoveMailRequest extends Object
Request object used for moving an email message between folders.

Contains message identification data and source/target folder information required to perform the operation.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private String
    accountEmail
    Email account containing the message.
    private String
    sender
    Sender email address.
    private Date
    sentDate
    Date and time when the message was sent.
    private String
    sourceFolderName
    Source folder from which the message should be moved.
    private String
    subject
    Message subject.
    private String
    targetFolderName
    Destination folder to which the message should be moved.
    private long
    uid
    Unique identifier of the email message.
